name: mission-control
description: Self-hosted AI agent orchestration platform: dispatch tasks, run multi-agent workflows, monitor spend, and govern operations from one mission control dashboard.
summaryZh: Self-hosted AI agent orchestration platform: dispatch tasks, run multi-agent workflows, monitor spend, and govern operations from one mission control dashboard. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
